title: System
scope: System-health dashboard: aggregates record counts across every installed app, plus DB size, the latest job and backup, the doc-curation cursor, and a process-level snapshot. Owns no schema — a single read-only metrics route the UI renders. NOT an admin control panel; System observes platform health.

specs.title: System metrics
specs.behavior: The dashboard aggregates record counts across all apps, DB size, the latest job and backup, the doc-curation cursor, and a process-level snapshot, exposed read-only to the UI.
